_note: Reviewer item #1a: `<svelte:self bind:this={me}>` (and `<svelte:component>`, `<svelte:boundary>`) must NOT go through the DOM-element bind:this check (`__svn_bind_this_check<HTMLElement>(…)`) — the bound expr is a component-instance ref, not an HTMLElement. Pre-fix this fired a spurious TS2322. The full component-instantiation port (#1b) is deferred; for now `bind:this` on these kinds is silently passed through, which matches upstream's no-error behavior on the same shape.
